description: Legal document in Hebrew. Location: Cairo. Dated: 5462 AM =1701/02 CE. Regarding a transaction between Shabbetay b. Masʿūd ____(?) and his father-in-law Yiṣḥaq Fer[..]ez. Both names are badly damaged and not completely legible. The lower portion of the document lays out terms for Shabbetay commits to repay a debt to his father-in-law over a two-year timespan. AA/ASE/MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
